title: eritrichium rupestre
intro: Eritrichium rupestre, also known as the "Rock Bistort", is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Eritrichium rupestre include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, skin issues, and respiratory problems. Eritrichium rupestre can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
